title: ExoMol line lists -- LXIV: Empirical rovibronic spectra of phosphorous mononitride (PN) covering the IR and UV regions
journal: Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical Society
abstract: A new phosphorous mononitride (31P14N, 31P15N) line list PaiN covering infrared, visible and ultraviolet regions is presented. The PaiN line list extending to the A1Pi-X1Sigma+ vibronic band system replaces the previous YYLT ExoMol line list for PN. A thorough analysis of high resolution experimental spectra from the literature involving the X1Sigma+ and A1Pi states is conducted, and many perturbations to the A1Pi energies are considered as part of a comprehensive MARVEL study. Ab initio potential energy and coupling curves from the previous work [Semenov et al., Phys. Chem. Chem. Phys., 23, 22057 (2021)] are refined by fitting their analytical representations to 1224 empirical energy levels determined using the MARVEL procedure. The PaiN line list is compared to previously observed spectra, recorded and calculated lifetimes, and previously calculated partition functions. The ab initio transition dipole moment curve for the A-X band is scaled to match experimentally measured lifetimes. The line list is suitable for temperatures up to 5000 K and wavelengths longer than 121 nm. PaiN is available from www.exomol.com.
body_text: ExoMol line lists LXIV for phosphorous mononitride PN. Line list name: PaiN. Replaces YYLT. Covers X1Sigma+ ground state and A1Pi excited state (IR and UV regions). Main isotopologue 31P-14N: 30327 states, 1333445 transitions, wavenumber range 0-82500 cm-1 (>121 nm), v=0..63 for X and v=0..74 for A, J=0..210. Second isotopologue 31P-15N: 31563 states, 1438181 transitions. Temperature range: up to 5000 K. MARVEL analysis performed using 6005 measured rovibronic transitions from 8 active experimental sources: 33CuHeHe (570 transitions), 72HoTiTo (2), 72WyGoMa (19), 81GhVeVa (2188 available, 1586 validated), 81MaLo (22), 95AhHa (62), 96LeMeDu (1680 available, 959 validated), 06CaClPu (16). Two additional sources excluded from MARVEL: 81CoPr (E-X band, 1382 transitions) and 87VeGhIq (unidentified bands). MARVEL yielded 1224 empirical energy levels. Model fitted using Duo variational code to X and A states, 12 parameters across 4 functions. PGOPHER effective Hamiltonian used to fill gaps in A state MARVEL coverage. Spectroscopic model uses Extended Hulburt-Hirschfelder PEC for X and Extended Morse Potential for A. A1Pi state is heavily perturbed by dark states (e3Sigma-, b3Pi, d3Delta, D1Delta, C1Sigma-) at multiple vibronic crossings. A-X transition dipole moment scaled by factor 1.28 to match experimental A v=0 lifetime of 227 +/- 70 ns. ExoMolOP opacities generated for ARCiS, TauREx, NEMESIS, petitRADTRANS. Affiliations: Semenov, Yurchenko, Tennyson at UCL; El-Kork at Khalifa University, Abu-Dhabi, UAE. Funding: ERC Advance Grant 883830, STFC ST/Y001508/1, Khalifa University ASPIRE AARE20-000329-00001 and grant 8474000336-KU-SPSC.
